_comment: Deliberate SDK release pin (Item 1A). Human-bumped, NOT regenerated. scripts/gen-sdk-distill.py asserts each axhub-sdk-<lang> repo HEAD == this pin before emitting and stamps pack/PINNED_SDK.json source_sha from here, so a generation against an unpinned SDK checkout fails loud. To bump: check out the new SDK release, update these shas + versions, regenerate, re-vendor into the axhub plugin. Vendored copy lives at axhub/skills/migrate/sdk-knowledge/PINNED_SDK.lock.json.
